plan.summary: Split the ranker into a public facade, five signal calculators, orchestration, BM25 cache, reasoning/calibration, and embedding cache/storage modules.

prove.findings_disposition: No behavioral findings. Initial CQ11 finding was remediated by completing the split: every production module is now <=70L and the facade is 16L. First adversarial pass was clean; mandatory large-diff second pass was attempted twice but all external providers returned empty (infrastructure failure).

progress: phase-1 dependency map and existing-code scan complete
phase-2 baseline 30 tests and TypeScript green
phase-3 78 focused and integration tests, TypeScript, and build green
adversarial pass 1 clean; pass 2 infrastructure failure after two attempts
